"'''The Creatures of Episode II'''" was an article that appeared in [[Star Wars Insider 63|''Star Wars Insider'' 63]], published in late [[2002]]. It was written by [[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]].

==Contents==
*[[Acklay/Legends|''Acklay'']]
*[[Reek/Legends|Reek]]
*[[Nexu/Legends|Nexu]]
*[[Orray/Legends|Orray]]
*[[Kouhun/Legends|Kouhun]]
*[[Massiff/Legends|Massiff]]

{{Magazine-stub|article}}

==Continuity==
The article notes how [[Lucasfilm]] addressed the discrepancy regarding the [[Reek/Legends|Reek's]] homeworld.

It also includes humorous matchups between the three arena beasts.
